title: RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
